prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年最低位次约13305名，2023年大幅前移至5145名，2024年进一步前移至3852名，2025年小幅后移至4704名。近四年位次波动较大，2025年基准位次约4704名 。；该校在宁夏理科（物理类）招生计划：2022年38人、2023年37人、2024年35人、2025年35人，2026年计划大幅扩招 至57人，较2025年增加22人，扩招幅度约62.9%。大幅扩招意味着竞争压力显著增大，位次预计明显后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西北大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学 排名2026年约第70名，近年排名在64-70之间波动，整体稳定；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及文学院副教授贾浅浅论文抄袭事件，学校已启动 调查；抖音热度排名第81位，评价为一般，综合热度约28.9万，短视频曝光量处于中等偏下水平。历史投档异常记录中未见西北大学相关信号。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理工科专业社会热度持续偏高，西北大学开设的计算机类、软件工程等专业受益于整体热度；化工与制药类 、环境科学与工程类等属生化环材大类，社会热度偏低。宁夏2026年普通高考总人数约66000人，较2025年（约65897人）基本持平，分科估算物理类考生约44550人，竞争基数未 明显变化。；西北大学位于陕西西安，与宁夏同属西北地区，地理距离较近，地域偏好对宁夏考生有一定正向作用；该校在 宁夏的招生人数占比较小，属跨省招生；偏负面声誉可能轻微削弱部分考生 的报考意愿；第五轮学科评估中，地质学获评A、考古学获评A、软件工程获评A-。其中软件工程与计算机类、电子信息类专业关联度高，对理科考生有一定吸引 力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4704名、2026年大幅扩招（35→57人）导致竞争加剧、学校声誉偏负面轻微削弱报考热度、考生规 模基本持平、西北地区地域偏好等因素，扩招是位次变化的最主要驱动因素。预测2026年最低位次约6428名，较2025年后移约1724名；位次区间5928-6928名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking was approximately 13305, which significantly advanced to 5145 in 2023, further advanced to 3852 in 2024, and slightly retreated to 4704 in 2025. Rankings have fluctuated greatly over the past four years, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being approximately 4704. The university's enrollment plan in Ningxia for science (physics category) was: 38 in 2022, 37 in 2023, 35 in 2024, 35 in 2025, and a substantial expansion to 57 in 2026, an increase of 22 from 2025, representing an expansion rate of about 62.9%. Such a large expansion implies significantly increased competition pressure, and the ranking is expected to retreat noticeably.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University ranking is approximately 70th in 2026, with recent rankings fluctuating between 64 and 70, overall stable; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the plagiarism incident of Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the College of Liberal Arts, and the university has initiated an investigation; its Douyin popularity ranking is 81st, with an evaluation of average, comprehensive popularity of about 289,000, and short video exposure at a moderately low level. No abnormal signals related to Northwest University have been found in historical admission records.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for science and engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remains high. Northwest University's Computer Science and Software Engineering majors benefit from this overall popularity; majors like Chemical Engineering and Pharmaceutical, Environmental Science and Engineering fall under the broader categories of biology, chemistry, environment, and materials, with lower social popularity. The total number of candidates for the Ningxia 2026 general college entrance examination is approximately 66,000, roughly the same as 2025 (about 65,897), with an estimated 44,550 physics category candidates, indicating no significant change in the competition base. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, which is geographically close to Ningxia, both in the northwest region, so regional preference has a certain positive effect on Ningxia candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Ningxia is small, making it a cross-provincial enrollment; the somewhat negative reputation may slightly weaken some candidates' willingness to apply; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Geology received an A, Archaeology received an A, and Software Engineering received an A-. Among these, Software Engineering is highly correlated with Computer Science and Electronic Information majors, which has some appeal to science candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4704, the substantial expansion in 2026 (35 to 57) leading to intensified competition, the somewhat negative reputation slightly weakening application enthusiasm, the roughly stable candidate pool, and the regional preference for the northwest area, the expansion is the primary driver of ranking changes. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 6428, a retreat of about 1724 from 2025; the ranking range is 5928-6928.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 6428, with a range of 5928-6928. Candidates with rankings above the lower limit (5928) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Oral Medicine and Computer Science; those around the middle of the range (about 6400) should target Tier 2 majors as the main direction, balancing academic strength and employment prospects; those near the upper limit (6928) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net to ensure admission. Northwest University's Software Engineering A- discipline strength is outstanding, and Computer Science-related majors are worth special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking was approximately 680; in 2023, about 662; in 2024, it significantly dropped to 2669; in 2025, it rebounded to 1215. Over the past four years, rankings first stabilized then fluctuated greatly, with a baseline ranking of about 1215 in 2025. Data for 2021 is missing. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Ningxia: 12 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 15 in 2024, 15 in 2025, and a planned reduction to 11 in 2026, a decrease of 4 from 2025, a reduction rate of about 26.7%. The reduction means fewer spots, slightly increased competition, but the ranking number is expected to move forward (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science ranking approximately 70th, stable in recent years; reputation evaluation in 2026 is slightly negative (Jia Qianqian's paper plagiarism incident), Douyin popularity average (ranked 81).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese Language major has high social popularity recommendation, obvious advantage for civil service exams; Journalism and Communication major has obvious social discouragement (Zhang Xuefeng effect continues); Foreign Language and Literature major is generally wait-and-see; Business Administration major is clearly discouraged. In 2026, Ningxia history category candidates are about 21,450, basically the same as 2025. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, in the same northwest region as Ningxia, with geographical proximity, which has some attraction for Ningxia liberal arts candidates; the slightly negative reputation may slightly reduce some candidates' willingness to apply, with an impact on liberal arts candidates similar to that on science candidates; Archaeology is rated A, directly corresponding to the archaeology major in liberal arts enrollment, with outstanding disciplinary strength; Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, Foreign Language and Literature, etc., although not rated A, Northwest University as a comprehensive university has a deep liberal arts foundation.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1215, the 2026 enrollment reduction (15 to 11) leading to fewer spots but ranking moving forward, slightly negative reputation slightly weakening popularity, stable candidate numbers, and the advantage of Archaeology as an A discipline, the enrollment reduction is the main driving factor for ranking change. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 1001, moving forward about 214 places from 2025; ranking range 821-1181.

Northwest University's Archaeology is an A-level discipline, leading nationally, and candidates interested in cultural relics and archaeology can consider it as a priority.
